channel.title: Anto Subash - acr
channel.description: Full-stack developer passionate about web technologies, microservices, and modern software development.

item.title: Cert Manager and Nginx Ingress Controller on AKS Cluster with static IP
item.description: In this we will setup Cert Manager and Nginx Ingress Controller on AKS Cluster

item.title: Create AKS cluster and ACR with Terraform
item.description: In this we will create Azure Kubernetes (AKS) cluster and Azure Container Registry (ACR).
